headline: UK Probe Puts Adobe Subscription Fees And Valuation In Investor Focus
summary: The UK Competition and Markets Authority has opened a probe into Adobe’s early cancellation fees and subscription terms. The investigation focuses on whether customers receive clear information about charges and contract conditions when signing up. This action adds to existing regulatory attention following the recent US Department of Justice settlement with Adobe. For investors following NasdaqGS:ADBE, this inquiry centers on the core subscription engine behind products like Creative Cloud...
